tasks.title: Domain record types and PlanningConfig: IncomeEntry, Obligation, ObligationCadence, ReserveSnapshot, ConfidenceTier, MonthlyBucket, RiskWindowFlag, RunwayResult, ExplanationLineItem, ExplanationEmphasis, PlanningConfig, PlanningResult — exact round-4 tech_specs shapes, no deviation.
acceptance_criteria: All types match tech_specs round-4 signatures exactly (field names, optionality)
All Codable/Hashable/Sendable conformances present
isCorrection on IncomeEntry is computed, never stored
Zero SwiftUI or persistence imports anywhere in Domain/

tasks.title: PlanningEngine.evaluate implementation: cadence expansion for all 5 cadences, baseline percentile calc, three-tier confidence thresholds, 14-day risk-window flagging, runway calc, explanation line items, never-floored safe-to-spend.
acceptance_criteria: Non-throwing static function matching locked signature exactly, asOf always caller-supplied with no default
Zero-income months materialize as real zero-height buckets, never omitted
Confidence tier boundaries exact: 0-1 insufficient, 2-5 low, 6+ full

tasks.title: Domain fixture test suite covering the full acceptance list: windfall non-inflation, lean-month handling, all 3 confidence tiers at exact thresholds, all 5 cadence expansions, 14-day risk window with multiple simultaneous flags, negative safe-to-spend unfloored, same-day duplicate summation, negative income corrections.
acceptance_criteria: Every case in Milestone 1's exit-criteria list has a named, passing test
Windfall-month fixture produces a safe-to-spend number that does not track the windfall, asserted with numeric tolerance

tasks.title: FinancialStore: concrete @MainActor @Observable class wired to FinancialDocumentStore, all mutators recompute synchronously via recomputePlanningResult with explicit per-call asOf; init hydrates manualFallbackEstimate from the document, snapshotDocument() round-trips it back out. Calls the polish_resilience-owned recomputePlanningResult helper as its only path into the engine — never PlanningEngine.evaluate directly.
acceptance_criteria: init never defaults manualFallbackEstimate to nil when the document has a value
snapshotDocument() includes the current manualFallbackEstimate
Every mutator takes asOf explicitly, no internal Date() default
No direct call to PlanningEngine.evaluate anywhere in this file — only via recomputePlanningResult

tasks.title: FinancialStore integrity tests: fallback-durability test (mutate manualFallbackEstimate, snapshot, reload through fake store, assert identical state) and the two-part relaunch assertion (raw record equality, then fresh engine run against reloaded records with original asOf, assert identical PlanningResult). This test blocks sign-off on both T-004 and T-011 jointly — neither lane self-certifies this one.
acceptance_criteria: Fallback-durability test passes
Two-part relaunch assertion passes as two distinct assertions, not one

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard and Money Inputs vertical slice on top of shared store and shared UI
acceptance_criteria: A first-time user can skip or complete onboarding inputs, add income and obligation data, optionally set reserve or manual fallback, and land on Dashboard with the correct confidence state.
Money Inputs supports distinct same-day income entries, negative corrections, cadence-aware obligations, and reserve editing without local shadow state.
Dashboard reflects safe-to-spend, runway, and risk-window outputs directly from FinancialStore and updates immediately after edits.
All reachable vertical-slice screens expose empty, loading, success, and recoverable error states where the workflow can reach them.

tasks.title: Implement Explanation-History and Settings-Data-Privacy flows including premium gate surfaces
acceptance_criteria: Explanation-History renders hand-traceable breakdown, history states, and its premium teaser surface without recomputing finance logic in the view.
Settings exposes biometric lock toggle state, import-export actions, privacy messaging, and a real local entitlement-backed locked row.
Import and export flows connect to service interfaces through coordinator-owned dependencies rather than direct file logic in views.
Feature surfaces preserve the four-top-level-surface information architecture with no extra navigation destination added.

tasks.title: Add resilience, acceptance, accessibility, and negative-path verification across the assembled app
acceptance_criteria: Test suite proves invalid import leaves on-disk data byte-identical, cancelled import produces zero writes, and manualFallbackEstimate survives export-import with identical insufficient-data confidence state.
Snapshot and accessibility verification cover default and AX5 hero rendering, icon-plus-text risk communication, and VoiceOver-readable confidence provenance.
Snapshot redaction and lock-scrim privacy checks are documented and manually verifiable for app-switcher and foreground transitions.
Final acceptance checklist covers lean-month and windfall-month scenario replay, hand-checkable runway math, honest cold-start states, and relaunch integrity.

tasks.title: Xcode project scaffold: create IrregularIncomePlanner.xcodeproj at /Users/pchordia/Documents/iOS-App-Factory/irregular-income-planner/, app + unit-test + UI-test targets, iOS 17 deployment target, folder groups matching the locked file layout (Domain/, Persistence/, Auth/, Entitlement/, Services/, App/, Features/{Dashboard,MoneyInputs,ExplanationHistory,Settings,Onboarding,AppLock}/, SharedUI/, Tests/{DomainTests,PersistenceTests,ViewModelTests,SnapshotTests}), Info.plist with NSFaceIDUsageDescription, empty SwiftUI App entry point that compiles and launches to a blank screen.
acceptance_criteria: Project builds and runs on iOS 17 simulator showing a blank screen
All folder groups exist and are wired to correct targets (app target vs test targets)
NSFaceIDUsageDescription present in Info.plist

tasks.title: FinancialDocument and AppSettings model structs plus ImportValidationError enum, exact round-4 shapes (manualFallbackEstimate lives on FinancialDocument, never AppSettings) — persistence-facing contract, owned by services_utilities per tech_specs' locked owning_lane stamp.
acceptance_criteria: FinancialDocument includes manualFallbackEstimate: Decimal?
AppSettings has no manualFallbackEstimate field
Both Codable with schemaVersion

tasks.title: FinancialDocumentStore + SettingsStore protocols, real atomic-write (temp-file + FileManager.replaceItemAt) implementations under file protection, plus in-memory fakes for testing.
acceptance_criteria: Writes are atomic (temp file then replace, never partial writes observable)
Both files stored under standard file protection in Application Support
Fakes support round-trip and load-error injection for tests

tasks.title: ImportExportService: exportData/validateImport, fully in-memory validation (via validateFinancialDocument), zero disk writes or store mutation inside the call.
acceptance_criteria: validateImport never touches disk or a live store
Malformed JSON, unsupported schema version, and invalid records (including negative manualFallbackEstimate) each produce the correct ImportValidationError case

tasks.title: AuthenticatorProtocol wrapping LAContext (real implementation) plus a fake for hardware-free testing; AuthAvailability/AuthResult enums.
acceptance_criteria: .unavailable case never dead-ends the caller
Fake authenticator can simulate success/failure/cancel/unavailable deterministically for coordinator tests

tasks.title: EntitlementService reading/writing AppSettingsStore.settings.entitlementActive.
acceptance_criteria: setEntitled persists through AppSettingsStore, isEntitled reflects current value with no caching drift

tasks.title: CurrencyFormatting: single formatting path, currencyCode nil defers to locale currency, large-number formatting never truncates.
acceptance_criteria: Large invoice-scale amounts format without truncation or scientific notation
Locale switch changes symbol/grouping correctly in a unit test

tasks.title: AppSettingsStore: concrete @MainActor @Observable class over AppSettings with setLockEnabled/setEntitlementActive/setOnboardingCompleted.
acceptance_criteria: Decode failure on load falls back to AppSettings defaults, never blocks launch

tasks.title: Import/export negative-path and round-trip tests: schema-invalid import leaves on-disk document byte-identical; cancelled import produces zero writes; insufficient-data user's manualFallbackEstimate survives export/import and lands on identical ConfidenceTier.insufficientData(manualFallback:).
acceptance_criteria: All three named tests present and passing
The fallback-estimate round-trip test asserts on ConfidenceTier, not just raw JSON equality

tasks.title: recomputePlanningResult helper: single call path into PlanningEngine.evaluate, sourcing manualFallbackEstimate consistently from the document. Owned here (polish_resilience) per tech_specs' locked owning_lane stamp, not folded silently into FinancialStore.
acceptance_criteria: FinancialStore's mutators call only this helper, never PlanningEngine.evaluate directly, so there is one call path to keep consistent

tasks.title: validateFinancialDocument: shared domain validation for import and post-decode load checks, rejecting a negative manualFallbackEstimate. Owned here (polish_resilience) per tech_specs' locked owning_lane stamp, not data_domain.
acceptance_criteria: Negative manualFallbackEstimate raises ImportValidationError.invalidRecord
Negative IncomeEntry.amount is NOT rejected (valid correction), asserted in a test distinguishing the two

tasks.title: AppRootCoordinator + AppRootState: settings-before-document bootstrap ordering, unlock-triggered concurrent document decode, corrupted-storage side-channel error, scenePhase handling.
acceptance_criteria: Unit test proves AppSettingsStore resolves before any FinancialStore load attempt
financialStore is nil while phase == .locked
Failed/cancelled auth discards any in-flight document load
Corrupted financial JSON still allows reaching Settings/import

tasks.title: AppLockScrim SwiftUI view: five states (locked-gate, authenticating, success, failure-with-retry, passcode-fallback), calm branded design, never composites/blurs real data. Applies SnapshotRedactionModifier at the app root for app-switcher redaction.
acceptance_criteria: Manual/visual check: no dashboard silhouette, no blurred content ever visible under the scrim
All five states reachable and distinct
Root view wraps content with redactedOnInactive(_:) from T-032

tasks.title: Shared UI component layer: EmptyStateView (parameterized, no shared generic text), HeroSafeToSpendCard, IncomeRibbonPath, ConfidenceTierIndicator, RunwayCard, RiskWindowCard, LockedFeatureRow. Built before Dashboard/MoneyInputs so neither invents its own empty-state copy. Accessibility (AX5 layout floor, icon+text signals, VoiceOver labels) is built in here by the same lane that consumes these components in-screen, not retrofitted later by a lane that never has to live with the result.
acceptance_criteria: Hero number holds layout at AX5 Dynamic Type without truncating
Ribbon uses three fixed styles only (solid/dashed/absent), static, no charts/tooltips
Confidence and risk signals are never color-only anywhere in these components

tasks.title: Onboarding + Dashboard: promise/privacy screens, symmetric skip affordances for income and reserve, Dashboard hero/runway/risk-window/quick-actions across all its states (skeleton, insufficient-data, low-confidence, fully-computed, negative-safe-to-spend, reserve-missing, corrupted-storage).
acceptance_criteria: Skipping income lands on Dashboard's insufficient-data state, not a dead end
All 7 named Dashboard states are reachable and visually distinct
Full vertical-slice path (cold launch through lock gate if enabled, onboarding, add income/obligation/reserve-or-fallback, Dashboard) works end to end and survives force-quit

tasks.title: Money Inputs: income CRUD (same-day duplicates distinct, negative corrections visually marked), obligation CRUD (cadence + due date, grouped by due date, manual amount only), reserve single-value panel with inline edit, manual fallback estimate editor writing through FinancialStore.updateManualFallbackEstimate.
acceptance_criteria: Two same-date income entries both appear distinctly and sum correctly in the engine
No field anywhere lets the app estimate or auto-fill an obligation amount
Deleting an obligation immediately updates safe-to-spend and risk flags

tasks.title: Explanation/History: plain-language receipt (baseline/obligations/reserve effect), chronological history, past confidence-tier transitions, premium teaser row using LockedFeatureRow.
acceptance_criteria: Every number shown is hand-reconstructible from raw entries
Empty state copy is distinct from Dashboard's insufficient-data wording

tasks.title: Settings/Data/Privacy: biometric lock toggle, export/import UI (ImportFlowState-driven: idle/validating/confirmingReplace/success/failure), premium locked/unlocked row wired to real EntitlementService.
acceptance_criteria: Import confirmation step required before replace; cancelling produces zero disk writes
Import failure shows a recoverable, non-destructive error state
Premium row visibly locked/unlocked based on a real flippable boolean, no StoreKit

tasks.title: SnapshotRedactionModifier: View extension swapping to a branded placeholder on scenePhase == .inactive before the system app-switcher snapshot.
acceptance_criteria: Modifier compiles and is documented as a manual QA checklist item (scenePhase transitions not asserted in CI)

tasks.title: Hero-card and confidence-state snapshot tests at default and AX5 Dynamic Type sizes.
acceptance_criteria: Snapshot coverage across insufficient-data/low-confidence/fully-computed/negative-safe-to-spend states at both type sizes

tasks.title: Currency formatting edge-case tests: large numbers, locale switches, negative values.
acceptance_criteria: No truncation or scientific notation at large invoice-scale amounts across at least 3 locales

tasks.title: Coordinator ordering and lock-boundary tests: AppSettingsStore-before-FinancialStore race test, financialStore-nil-while-locked, failed-auth discards in-flight load, passcode-unavailable falls through to unlocked-with-notice.
acceptance_criteria: All four named behaviors covered by passing unit tests using the fake authenticator and fake stores

tasks.title: Final Milestone 6 acceptance-bar replay against the fully assembled app: multi-month data with a lean and a windfall month, safe-to-spend that doesn't spike off the windfall, hand-checkable runway math, honest zero/one-entry states, all surviving a full relaunch. Own pass/fail criteria, run after every other task closes.
acceptance_criteria: Scripted end-to-end scenario passes against the assembled app, not assumed satisfied by earlier unit tests summed together
A person can hand-verify the final safe-to-spend and runway numbers from the raw fixture data
